meta.title: 5. ICS Security Assessments with Jonathan Pollet
meta.description:
Jonathan Pollet has been assessing ICS security since 2001. He teaches a five day class with a full day on this topic. Here he pulls out the most important 40 minutes for you to know. 

At 9:30 he goes through how he recommends you do the assessment without bringing the ICS down. He covers the preparation, onsite and offsite work, team members, time required and more. There is even methodology tips and warnings of common issues.
